name: createFacebookAd
description: Creates a Facebook Ad. IMPORTANT Workflow: Make sure an ad set has been created in this conversation. Use the ad_account_id and adset_id from the previous steps. Use the creative_id from the ad creative creation step. Ad will automatically follow the schedule set in the ad set

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command before attempting ad creation.

name.description: Name of the ad. Should be descriptive and include the target audience and creative type.

adset_id.description: Must be obtained from the ad set created earlier in this conversation.

creative_id.description: Must be obtained from the ad creative created earlier in this conversation.

status.description: Set to ACTIVE to respect the ad set's schedule
